tasks.subject: Task 0: Extract resolve_db_path into db.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single owner for resolve AGENTIC_DB_PATH + init-if-missing; server.py and orchestrate.py both call db.resolve_db_path(); no behavior change.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/db.py", "mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/server.py", "mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_db.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_db.py tests/test_server.py tests/test_orchestrate.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resolve_db_path honors env var, defaults, inits missing", "existing DB not re-initialized destructively", "both modules call db.resolve_db_path; no private _db_path remains", "test_server + test_orchestrate pass unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Wire node-level weeding into the tick
tasks.description:
**Goal:** tick() surfaces stale non-terminal nodes (read-only) in result["stale_nodes"] as ids, alongside flag_stale_specs.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_orchestrate.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["result['stale_nodes'] is a list of ids", "stale non-terminal node appears", "fresh node does not", "step mutates nothing (status + last_touched unchanged)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Retry cap via CriticalLoop reuse
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persistently failing task escalates on 3rd cumulative failure via a dispatch-failure Finding + CriticalLoop; recovery resolves the loop. Rewire 3 failure sites + merge recovery; add _find_open_dispatch_loop + _handle_failure helpers; import findings + loops.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_orchestrate.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3rd launch failure -> status escalated, loop iteration_count==3 + diagnostic fired, escalations entry", "escalated task not re-dispatched", "3 NEEDS_FIXING -> escalated", "fail-then-succeed resolves loop, no escalation", "existing single-failure tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Opt-in integration-branch enforcement
tasks.description:
**Goal:** tick(integration_branch=...) refuses to merge unless HEAD matches; skips merges + escalates each CLEAN task, non-fatal. None preserves today's behavior. Add _real_current_branch seam, current_branch_fn param, merge-phase guard, CLI flag.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -m \"not llm\" -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["integration_branch=None identical to today", "matching branch merges", "mismatch -> zero merges, merge_fn never called, all CLEAN escalated, claims held", "CLI --integration-branch passes through", "full fast suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update orchestrate docs + handoff
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reflect the four changes in commands/orchestrate.md, the orchestrate.py module docstring, and HANDOFF.md (mark items 1-4 closed, leave item 5).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["commands/orchestrate.md", "mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py", "docs/plans/HANDOFF.md"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -m \"not llm\" -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["orchestrate.md documents --integration-branch + stale_nodes summary key + retry cap", "module docstring states retry cap + opt-in enforcement", "HANDOFF reflects 1-4 closed, 5 remaining", "fast suite green"]}
```
